commit.message:
feat: intelligent reminder lead time based on task type

- Meeting/appointment: remind 30 min before (not at start time)
- Payment/bills: remind 3 days before
- Deadline/submission: remind 1 day before
- Travel/flight: remind 2 hours before
- Medical appointment: remind 1 hour before
- Other timed tasks: remind 15 min before
- No time specified: remind at 9am on due date

Also: reminder confirmation always shows actual remind time vs due time

commit.message:
refactor(uglyhat): row_to_struct macro, DecisionStatus enum, exact tag filtering, concurrent queries

- Add row_to_struct! declarative macro to eliminate 9 hand-written row_to_* functions across 7 files
- Add DecisionStatus enum (mirrors ThreadStatus pattern), change Decision.status from String to enum
- Replace LIKE-based tag filtering with json_each() for exact match semantics (fixes "auth" matching "authentication")
- Extract push_tag_clauses helper to deduplicate tag filtering in memory.rs and decision.rs
- Replace sequential awaits with tokio::try_join! in context.rs for concurrent query execution
- Add test_tag_exact_match regression test

commit.message:
R14: validation synthesis — 9 hypotheses classified, 2-track plan

Synthesis of 3-agent analysis:
- Gap analysis: 8/9 hypotheses PROVEN, metacircular UNVALIDATED
- Experiment design: 7 falsifiable experiments (committed separately)
- Lean audit: 6/11 claims proven, 5 absent (oracle cells, tentative
  state, ⊥, cell-zero, evaluate→claim→freeze)

Two-track plan: empirical experiments (polecats) + Lean formalization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: CZ-exercise bottom propagation simulation (ce-1zw3)

Simulate cell-zero handling ⊥ on a 4-cell program where fetch-data
produces ⊥ via exhaustion policy. Key finding: all downstream cells
(parse, summarize, fallback) block forever because cell-zero's scheduler
only checks ⊥? handler declarations, not ∴ body content. Proposes
given? (optional-given) syntax to let cells opt into ⊥-awareness while
preserving the scheduler/evaluator separation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: cell/polecats/thunder
Rig: cell
Role: polecats

Layer5全ページに演出を追加（251-282番）

- 251: フェードイン演出
- 261: タイプライター＋微ノイズ＋背景フラッシュ
- 262-270: 崩壊開始グリッチ（段階的に強度上昇）
- 271-277: 崩壊後半グリッチ（最大強度、277でFINAL_ENTRY一時停止）
- 278: RESTORED演出（グリッチ→白フラッシュ→完全停止）
- 279: 強制待機フェードイン（3s/8s/15s）
- 280: フェードイン→20s暗転→281へ自動遷移
- 281: 新規作成（閉館テキスト→グリッチ→バックスペース消去→282へ）
- 282: 新規作成（エンディング・クレジット）

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

R14: experiment design for Cell hypothesis validation

7 falsifiable experiments targeting core theoretical claims:
- E6: Fusion necessity (substrate separation test)
- E1: Confluence under semantic non-determinism
- E3: Bottom-as-absence (phantom propagation test)
- E4: Metacircular evaluator test
- E2: Crystallization faithfulness
- E5: Oracle hierarchy termination
- E7: Non-termination vs quiescence

Synthesized from 3-agent gap analysis, Lean coverage audit,
and experiment design research.

Localize background section images to public/images/background/

Downloaded 38 external images to local folders and updated all .md
files to reference local paths instead of hotlinked URLs. Added empty
:::images blocks to all 7 sections that didn't have them so images
can be added by dropping files into folders and adding paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Refactor tmux window identification from int indices to str names

Window indices get reused when windows are killed and recreated,
causing terminated agents to point at windows owned by other agents.
Switch to unique window names ({agent_name}-{session_id[:4]}) which
are stable and never collide.

Key changes:
- Session.tmux_window: int → str throughout
- Window names generated as {name}-{uuid[:4]} before tmux window creation
- session_id pre-generated and passed to create_session
- All tmux lookups use window_name= instead of window_index=
- Tmux targets use :={name} for exact name matching
- Removed window collision detection code (no longer needed)
- Backward compat: from_dict converts legacy int values to str

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
test(mneme): baseline tests for all 18 graph algorithms + KCore impl (#709)

## Summary

- Adds **57 test functions** covering all 18 graph algorithm fixed rules
(previously: 2 tests total)
- Implements the missing **`KCore` fixed rule** (k-core decomposition
via iterative peeling), registered as `KCore` in the built-in registry
- Fixes a bug in the new `KCore` implementation:
`as_directed_graph(!undirected)` was negated; corrected to
`as_directed_graph(undirected)`
- Every algorithm now has: basic correctness, empty/minimal graph,
disconnected graph, and ≥1 algorithm-specific edge-case test

## Algorithms covered (57 tests, 18+ algorithms)

| Algorithm | Tests |
|-----------|-------|
| ShortestPathDijkstra | 4 |
| BetweennessCentrality | 3 |
| ClosenessCentrality | 2 |
| ShortestPathAStar | 3 |
| BFS | 2 |
| DFS | 2 |
| DegreeCentrality | 3 |
| MinimumSpanningForestKruskal | 3 |
| MinimumSpanningTreePrim | 2 |
| LabelPropagation | 3 |
| PageRank | 3 |
| RandomWalk | 3 |
| StronglyConnectedComponents | 3 |
| ConnectedComponents | 3 |
| TopSort | 3 |
| ClusteringCoefficients | 3 |
| KShortestPathYen | 2 |
| CommunityDetectionLouvain | 2 |
| ShortestPathBFS | 3 |
| **KCore (new)** | **5** |

## Test plan

```bash
# Run graph algo tests (requires mneme-engine feature):
cargo test -p aletheia-mneme \
  --no-default-features --features mneme-engine,graph-algo \
  -- engine::fixed_rule::tests::graph_algo_tests

# Clippy with default features:
cargo clippy -p aletheia-mneme --all-targets -- -D warnings
```

Expected: 57 passed, 0 failed

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

Co-authored-by: Cody Kickertz <cody@forkwright.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-authored-by: admin <admin@ardentleatherworks.com>

repository.name: aletheia
repository.description: Distributed cognition system — infrastructure, tooling, and continuity

commit.message:
refactor(mneme): replace BoxErr with DataError snafu enum in data/ module (#708)

## Summary

- Create `engine/data/error.rs` with a `DataError` snafu enum containing
19 typed, matchable error variants replacing the string-erased `BoxErr`
(`Box<dyn Error>`) pattern
- Convert all ~300 `bail!`/`miette!`/`ensure!` macro call sites across 7
data/ submodules (`functions.rs`, `aggr.rs`, `program.rs`,
`relation.rs`, `expr.rs`, `symb.rs`) to use specific snafu context
selectors
- Add `IntoDbResult` bridge trait for cross-module boundaries during
migration period
- Change `Op.inner` function pointer to return `DataResult` for
end-to-end type safety within the data layer

### Error variants introduced

`TypeMismatch`, `ComparisonTypeMismatch`, `VectorLengthMismatch`,
`ByteLengthMismatch`, `DivisionByZero`, `IndexOutOfBounds`,
`InvalidValue`, `AssertionFailed`, `ParseFailed`, `InvalidRegex`,
`EncodingFailed`, `JsonPath`, `BadTime`, `UnboundVariable`,
`NotImplemented`, `FieldNotFound`, `CoercionFailed`, `InvalidSymbol`,
`ProgramConstraint`, `InsufficientAccess`, `Json`

### Stats

- Zero `bail!`/`miette!`/`ensure!` remaining in data/ non-test code
- 10 files changed, 880 insertions, 838 deletions (net -negative LOC)

## Test plan

- [x] `cargo check -p aletheia-mneme --features
mneme-engine,storage-redb` — clean
- [x] `cargo test -p aletheia-mneme` — 549 tests pass
- [x] `cargo clippy -p aletheia-mneme --all-targets -- -D warnings` —
clean
- [x] Zero `bail!`/`miette!`/`ensure!` in data/ non-test files verified
via grep

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(infra): restart allocator after config, use nproc --all (#172)

## Summary
- Use `nproc --all` instead of `nproc` to get total installed CPUs
(ignores allocator reservations)
- Restart `nitro-enclaves-allocator` after configuring yaml so CPU pool
matches new config

## Root cause
Deploy on c7i.12xlarge failed with `[ E22 ] Insufficient CPUs available
in the pool`:
1. `nproc` returned 46 (not 48) because old allocator had 2 CPUs
reserved
2. Allocator was never restarted in the 1GB hugepage path — CPU pool was
stale (2 CPUs)

## Test plan
- [ ] CI green
- [ ] deploy-prod.yml succeeds after merge
- [ ] Enclave starts with 46 vCPUs on c7i.12xlarge

to coerce LLM-returned objects/dicts into proper string lists before
building CodebaseContext — prevents [object Object] rendering in the UI.

TraceView for observations and grounding_notes interpolations. Fix stage
numbering in StageTrack to use fixed STAGE_NUMBERS map instead of
dynamic array index, preventing renumbering when explore is filtered out.

commit.message:
Add PayoutDelegate.onInboundTransfer for on-chain verification (#130)

* Add TransferDelegate with onInboundTransfer for on-chain verification

Rename PayoutDelegate → TransferDelegate, payout → outboundTransfer.
Add optional onInboundTransfer(transactionId, source, asset, destination,
amount, exCtx) so the delegate can verify inbound transfers on-chain
before the vanilla service credits the destination account.

Also add source field to PlannedInboundTransferContext/InboundTransferContext
and pass it through the skeleton plan service.

Add InboundTransferVerificationError for delegates to throw when
verification fails.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Rename vanilla-service.ts to service.ts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Make logger configurable via setLogger and createVanillaServices

Allow consumers to pass their own winston logger instance either
through setLogger() directly or via the optional third argument
to createVanillaServices(). Falls back to a default console logger.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add rollback to EscrowDelegate and wire to vanilla rollback

Call delegate.rollback() before local unlock so the delegate can
revert the external escrow hold. On failure, funds stay held.

  - `api/kn.php` — findBuilding (přes kodAdresnihoMista z ARES) + importUnits

  - `api/avatar.php` — upload (MIME check, max 2MB) + delete
  - `js/ui.js` — makeAvatarEl, initials fallback, barevná paleta
  - `js/pages/nastaveni.js` — widget pro změnu/odebrání fotky

  - `admin-users.js` — správa uživatelů
  - `admin-invites.js` — pozvánky
  - `admin-settings.js` — systémová nastavení (AES klíče)

consolidate duplicated data (commonMappings, blockIdCounter, builtin constants),
eliminate hardcoded concept names (diagnostics→data-driven rules, precedence→Map,
storage→parameterized default language, generateExpression→metadata-driven fallback),
decouple language↔UI (ToolboxCategoryDef→core/types, cognitiveLevel→shouldStripScaffold),
and parameterize LevelSelector (accepts LevelDef[] from outside).

commit.message:
Pre-download RNNoise model with media libraries instead of at clip-write time

Moves RNNoise model download into ensure_media_libraries() so it happens
alongside FFmpeg and pip video group downloads. All clip-write, recording,
and audio-check paths now use find_rnnoise_model() (local-only lookup)
instead of ensure_rnnoise_model() (which attempted network downloads),
preventing network calls during recording or clip encoding. Adds warning
logs when noise suppression is requested but the model is unavailable.

feat(infra): scale prod to c7i.12xlarge for TEE performance (#171)

## Summary
- Bump prod instance from m5.xlarge (4 vCPU, 16GB) to c7i.12xlarge (48
vCPU, 96GB)
- Auto-detect CPU/memory in deploy script — enclave gets `nproc - 2`
vCPUs and `MemTotal - 16GB` RAM
- Add 1GB hugepage support for c7i (Sapphire Rapids 4096 memory-region
limit), fallback to 2MB on m5
- Set `HARDWARE_CONCURRENCY=$(nproc)` in enclave entrypoint and prover
container so bb uses all CPUs
- Downsize devnet from c7i.12xlarge to m5.xlarge to stay within 64 vCPU
on-demand limit

## Infrastructure already applied
- `tofu apply` completed: prod is c7i.12xlarge (running), devnet is
m5.xlarge (running)
- Instance IDs unchanged (in-place resize), no secret updates needed
- CloudFront timeout stays at 120s (account limit; 180s needs AWS
support ticket)

## Test plan
- [x] `tofu plan` showed only expected changes (2 instance resizes)
- [x] `tofu apply` succeeded, both instances running
- [x] `bun run test` passes (lint + typecheck + unit tests)
- [x] `bun run lint:shell` passes (shellcheck on deploy script)
